pre_impl_questions.question: Is Config.vm_distro removed from the dataclass?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — field deleted. from_wizard() and load() no longer pass or read it.

pre_impl_questions.question: Does Config.save() no longer emit distro: under vm:?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — 'distro': self.vm_distro removed from vm_data dict in save().

pre_impl_questions.question: Does loading distro: ubuntu log INFO and succeed?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — Config.load() logs INFO 'vm.distro is no longer used; you can remove it from .clauded.yaml' for any non-None, non-alpine distro value and continues loading.

pre_impl_questions.question: Does loading distro: alpine still raise ConfigValidationError?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — the alpine check is now inline in Config.load() (the FR5 message is preserved identically).

pre_impl_questions.question: Is the config_no_vm_distro seam produced?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — Config no longer has vm_distro; all consumers (Stories 04-07) must not pass that kwarg.

post_impl_questions.question: Were all tooling gates green after the story?
post_impl_questions.answer: Yes — lint, format, typecheck all pass. 1008 passed, 5 skipped, 0 failed.

post_impl_questions.question: Were the 4 Story 03 skip markers in test_config_distro.py honored?
Were any additional skips needed?
post_impl_questions.answer: Yes — test_provisioner.py::test_opencode_alpine_raises needed a Story 04 skip (the opencode-alpine guard was removed as a side effect of removing vm_distro, and this test was testing that guard).
